title: crotalaria aurea
intro: Crotalaria aurea, also known as the golden rattlebox or yellow rattlebox, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria aurea include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
